text: [[VIDEOID:bd0b65d7d2213eac9d39e0d94a83a530]] The catnip works and a good size for cats. Nicely presented and holds up to cat-handling. A bit too pricey for just one item, but I got it as a gift so what the heck. The cat and her owners got a kick out of them.

This is cute.  I hope to be able to wear it once I untangle it fully.  Had to untangle the gemstone end of things.  I'm stuck trying to untangle the fastener end of things.  Otherwise the chain length is perfect.  Glad it's just a gift to me, because this chain is a mother to untangle
Very cheap already oxidation in 5 days
Necklace sent was not the one advertised cheap clasp returned

This didn't specify when I purchased it at least, if it was plated copper or straight silver. The metal plate and collar were poorly braised to fit out of rough edged copper and plated. After a week you cant wear this pendant in any skin to metal fashion even by replacing the chain. The braised copper joints are too sharp and do cut surface skin tissues.

Secondly, the gemstones appear to be of only three colors due to the color and clarity or selected stones. These are
NOT soldered into place but rather glued and, while don't just "pop-off", are not the quality expected for the other major shortfalls.

Suggest: make the bezel and ring out of silver and solder the chakra stones to the wand. Don't use superglue. Save money one the chain because it's basically trash and can be replaced at any jewelry store in a patrons local store (brining back small businesses) for a marginal fee of less than $100 00 depending on the style of chain they (the customer) likes.
Not really what I was looking for
I didn’t know it was just going to be a cardboard piece of paper. It’s cute and everything but it’s just a cardboard flat I thought it was an actual something you could hang up

I LOVE this water bottle and it has me staying on track with my water intake!
The only negative I have is a few of the letters are starting to come up off it. When I ordered it I didn't realize the design was a decal, I thought it was going to be smooth and a part of the bottle itself. Mine is already peeling and I haven't had it long. It has not gone through through the dish washer and it hand cleaned. Other than that, I absolutely love it and take the bottle everywhere with me
My hubby loves coffee scent. These are Warm, but not overpowering. I like a bit more deep scent, but if you prefer ligh, this is a good option.

If there was a negative I would give it that!!! All you see in this add is the word snow globe!!!! I found out after the fact at the very end it says not an actual snow globe!!!!! It is a cheap plastic ornament you will be embarrassed to give!

The strap promptly fell apart.  I contacted the seller and asked for a replacement strap, they said they would send one if I paid them $5 through pay pal. In the mean time I'm waiting for the strap to come in the mail, now the button latch no longer closes. Its lovely, but falling apart quickly.
I ordered 2 of these and both times the "teeth" that holds the fabric pulled away from the fabric over a very short period of time. I would not recommend.

Because I live in the Worst state in the country... and I'm forced to wear a mask every other month... I got this because I want to actually breathe and I'm not afraid of a sore throat and a fever... this thing is barely better than a regular mask.

Sloppy cut Outline requires additional work to align correctly. No instructions package...had to ask instructions.

Appears sloppy cut pieced left over from other work and delivered 3 weeks after order.
Not made well very flimsy
Not the material you're hoping for. Please be mindful and check other reviews as well.

I'm disappointed because I ordered the gold option with solid pearls (like in the picture), but it came with silver beads in with the pearl beads.  The picture shows solid pearl beads.  I didn't want any silver in it at all.  Now I have pearl beads with silver beads and gold connectors.

These bend very easily and get distorted.  It is hard to get them to be round again.  I found a thin chapstick that I put them on and rolled it which helped a little but they are ruined after just a few wears.
This looked cool. My wife and I got them for airplane. Still couldn't breathe through it. Flexed and wouldn't fit just off the one way flight. Not sturdy.
[[VIDEOID:eda4c09622b6caa291a986bead565145]] Went on smoothly, and looks great!  The vinyl is strong and seems like it will last many years.
Poor wuality
Good gift for a laugh
This chembuster is stunning!!! I hooked up an mp3 player with specific frequencies to continually be released!!!
I bought this for a gift and I was not disappointed . It is very nice looking.
Mine arrived not as colorful as the one pictured.  The 'blue' is rather dull.

Wasn't at all what I expected. Was a lot smaller than expected. I should have taken the measurements but I was in a rush because I had to throw the party together at the last minute. The quality wasn't that great for the price. Will not order again.

Thought the design and sentiment were perfect. Wish I had known that even the inside (writing surface) was glossy. I definitely avoid those as I'm particular about the handwriting inside the card, and glossy surfaces are difficult to navigate unless you have a certain kind of pen, which I then had to order. If this doesn't concern you the way it does me (I could just be Covid-cranky), you will probably love these.
I got these as a gift and they were a winner!
An ok copy of what I thought would be better quality print. Won’t frame as a gift.  Will keep it in my recipe notebook.

I was surprised at how big this purse was.  My friend uses it all the time as we live in a senior building and when we have social things in our entertaining room, she puts her coffee cup, utensils, mail, whatever she wants in it.  It holds just about everything as it is very sturdy.  My friend loved her 80th birthday present.
big hole in one side where the ring attaches to the piece  holding the stone. that’s the reason for 3 stars but i wear it every day it’s my birthstone and still looks amazing
Expected a plaque or a complete wallhanging

I like the ring, however it has already tarnished.  I have worn it less than a week and I cleaned with the piece of cloth that came with the ring and it was black from the corrosion that was on the ring.  This is totally on me, I did not realize the property of silver, however I will need to get some more of those cleaning clothes if I intend to wear it.
Not a great price!
Really cheap quality..super thin..
nice gift for someone you love

Really small for the price! I wish I had paid more attention to the description. I wanted something my almost 2 year old could draw a nice "picture" in. She loves dinosaurs and this is the only one I could find.
Scratched up when we received it
The scent is almost nonexistent

My pendant is not at all what I expected or even what is pictured under the product listing. Please see my images to get an accurate representation of what the pendant looks like. I was disappointed it had very little blue sheen and the pretty blue that was there was on the back! You can tell it is true moonstone though because it’s far from flawless. Mine has a black fleck inside along with a lot of white cloudiness
These are great! The gold did fade after a few months.

Looks like a new 2x8 painted. Nothing about this wood looks salvaged. The shelf works well but not with the cheap plastic Molly's. I used toggle mollies. I wish it looked more distressed. I will lightly sand the edges tho to achieve this look. The paint color was accurate. I chose the blueish green color for my bathroom. I needed a custom size. If you don't need a custom size or color, it's not worth the money honestly. It's well constructed, just overpriced.
Great earrings but for a little girl, my eight year old grand daughter they are perfect for she loves them!! Not for an adult

I am sorry to have to write that I really do not like this product because it was actually made in the USA, or so they claim. It would be a wonderful piece if only it were bigger. I realize that the measurement was clear on-line, but upon getting it, it really is SMALL. The crescent moon and stars do not hang correctly against the blue field. They have been put on backwards and the entire concept is not the elegant piece I thought it would be.
Bought for my grand daughter who is a Princess and loves the bracelet. If she's happy, I'm happy.
This is a beautiful flag. Delivery was quick and I am beyond pleased.
Very nice for the money

This item is so hard to determine as the correct size.  The listing says it may be a little bigger than normal woman sizes.  Many top reviews here say it runs SMALLER!  We measured and it still came in too large.  Now we have to return and buyer apparently pays shipping.  I will now not buy from a seller who does not offer free returns on clothes (which can vary tremendously).
Not good quality for the price.
Pretty flimsy and gets bent out of shape easily it just doesn’t look right after it’s adjusted on the stethoscope. Cute though!

I followed the directions and loved the way the ring looked in my nose.  However, while performing housework, I happened to catch a glance of myself and discovered the ring was GONE!!  The nose-ring is so tiny, however, I looked everywhere for it.  $9 down the drain within hours of enjoyment.  Perhaps, an adjustment could be made to the ring so that it will fit more securely.  Pretty while it lasted.
Looks cheap
Well made and Beautiful!  Packaged so nicely.  The quality is e  xtremely good.  They are well worth the money.  I purchased 24 of them and will be ordering more!  Alice Franklin, TN
This bracelet is really thin, would be surprised if it would last a day on your wrist.
A cute inexpensive ring. Reminds me of an find at an art and crafts fair.
Very pretty charm.  Smaller than expected and somewhat overpriced in my opinion, but very pretty.
I like it but they could have added instructions on how to adjust the size it was by accident that I realize after I tried to force it on with a knife that you have to pull the band's
Color more subdued than vibrant. Expected bright pink with red tones as shown rather than one shade of lighter pink without much variance or red tones.  Didn’t want dull colors

I purchased this exact item from a different seller, maybe this particular company, it's been too long..(but not on Amazon) The picture is SO COOL!!  The mounting on the wood leaves MUCH to be desired.  Looks like they just tucked it over the sides, threw some staples in and called it done.  The sawtooth hanger wasn't even centered and was smashed... ? Odd canvas, and I love canvases!!
I liked the print I did not like the texture of the print
Great for anyone who is a needle worker and is down with feminism. I bought this for a friend, and she loved it.
Smells nothing like grape or any fruit & gave me a headache-so disappointed!
YOU CAN BARELY  AND I MEAN BARELY READ THE NAMES!!!!!  PICTURE IS VERY VERY DECEIVING!  VERY VERY VERY DISAPPOINTED!  DO NOT RECOMMEND! PIECE OF JUNK!!!!!!!

Poster came in today, looks nice. I didn't realize it didn't come with a frame. That was my bad, I should have read it more carefully. On that note without a frame it is definitely overpriced. It's literally a thick piece of paper with a design on it.
Looks nothing like the one pictured-it has not been polished and is from a selection of low quality crystal.
Looked a lot more sturdy and substantial in photo.  Thought it looked kind of cheap and flimsy in person.
Bigger than I thought they would be but very pretty.
High quality. Outstanding workmanship. Detailed. Highly recommend this ring - and artist! Truly a work of art. Could not be happier! The ring is perfect! Love my Mavis!
Horrible product. You get three Q-tips and one tiny nozzle you put on the end of a glue pin. Does not work
Has the feel of vintage jewelry
It is pretty but not as luminous as in the picture. Still, it’s a keeper
I like it. It is okay. It is not the best quality print, but for the price it is cute.
Like the large size of the beads and the fragrance is soothing!  Disappointed that I only got one pouch.  Very fair price and appreciate the free shipping too.
Looks great!
I bought this as a gift and all it is is a picture printed off of someone’s computer. I can’t even bring myself to give it as a gift.
This item is gorgeous!!! It is exactly as described and I can feel all the good energy that has been put into this item.  POWERFUL!!!
These stickers which we bought 2 of don't stick and especially to anything that gets wet. The owners are also not helpful and be careful these are not what they promise. Bad quality for sure.
It's beautiful and detailed and has the perfect size. Thank you!
Nice fragrance.  A little too sweet smelling for me. Won’t be buying again

I had previously ordered this item through the official Bella Des website and liked it.  I decided to order through here but the product is slightly different and the scent isn't really the same at all. So I'm not sure if it's just a difference in batches or formula change or what.  It's nice but not what I wanted really.

THIS IS NOT A SNOW GLOBE!!!!!! All you see is the words snow globe!!!! Wrong it’s a cheap piece of plastic you pay 14.00 for!!! Very dissatisfied!  Not sure if I will even give these to my grandkids!!!!
Nice
This ring is nice. I like unusual jewelry so this ring fits the bill.

I thought the color and quality would be better for the price. It basically looks like some kid is printing on photo paper on their home printer.  The white is gray and the pink is so faint it is barely distinguishable from the white. I would have been better off printing it myself.

Was great until 2 weeks later, it faded to the point where you couldn't read it or tell what was in it. Very disappointing but since it was a gift I tried to paint over and see if I got more time out of it.

I am writing this review to warn people that it isn't very secure as i lost the entire band on the third day of wearing it. I did follow directions so that wasn't the problem but rather it must have caught on something without my notice. You also can't see through it which is a bit annoying when i did have it. It needs a snap not just velcro
Very cheap already oxidation in 5 days
It was hard to tell from the picture but it was made on an old book page. It does not come with frame which was a little disappointing but overall really like it! Great value!

high quality and very securely packaged to assure perfection upon delivery.  would order more from this seller. though it's more like a printed photo.  nice enough, but teeny tiny,as in 5x8 print out.  it's fine for my purposes, but be aware.

This one actually was for pregnancy. The minis are definitely mini but still pack a powerful punch!! I needed this for a small space and it fits perfectly!!! I asked for an additional stone to be added and it is gorgeous!!
Thanks Sander

This towel is really poor quality.  The image is beautiful, but it is in one corner, not centered across the bottom.  The towel edges are serged with a very stiff thread, so the edges are uneven and scratchy.  This looks like something that would come from a discount dollar store and not a towel that costs $15.

This is well made, and I love the artistic grooves in the top. It's a nice weight, hard wood.

It is not stained though. It's a really light bright wood, not at all dark like the picture.

So I'll have to find some time to sand it down and stain it so it's darker.

I accidentally ordered the XS, so I contacted the seller right away to see if I could get a S instead, they never responded. Then I received the XS, so I decided to just use it while my puppy was still little. The first time I put it on her to take her for a walk, the moment she started walking the clasp came apart. So I took it off, clicked it back into place and barely pulled in it and it came apart over and over again. I submitted for a return do to a faulty clasp and still no response. What a waste of money. I would not recommend buying from this seller.
good quality arrived quickly. sweet note from the seller, she even included a face mask for the C19 virus
Bought this for my outdoor shower and everyone loved it. HOWEVER, one month later, it looked like this. So disappointed this was not stated in the description. Can’t reach seller for a refund. 😢
It fits over my hand with ease.
Ended up throwing it in a pile.  I didn't realize it was copy size paper
These earrings are very pretty.  I haven't worn them yet but hoping they are also comfortable.
Doesn’t hold well
Way too thin and sharp
These earrings were too tiny for me. Was looking for something a bit larger. Also the stone is much much darker (looks almost black) than what is pictured. Had to return.
These are a great value and really cute but they're difficult to put on.  So I don't wear them much.
This item came with incorrect date on both shirts! And says nonreturnable

This is an absolutely beautiful onesie! Our answered prayer is yet to be born, but I cannot wait for baby to wear this! My only negative to the onesie is that the lettering gets covered with pants on.
Ok
Fits well and quite comfortable but not perfect. Seems a bit thin and a seam falls right on the bridge of the nose. Not bad but slight discomfort. The large size is great for a big head and/or beard.
This doesn't really do the job. Maybe I have an extra cold nose.  :>)
I loved it when I first got it but then noticed that the leather was pulling loose of the plastic part that holds the phone. I sent it back
This is a great drawing. I framed it and hung it in my office.
Love these

More beautiful than photo shows.  This was a gift and the recipient loved it!  Although it is a little small even for an average "medium" wrist.  It is expandable so this may not be a problem for most wearers.  Otherwise, a great piece of jewelry.
This is a well made table leg, however, I ordered the wrong one. When I went to return it, I found out returns were not free. It would have cost almost what I paid for the leg to return it.
Great quality and got here in good time thanks
Got this for a gift and she loved it

Warning - The product description reads "slight variation" but the ring is completely different. The vertical stone on the side is about half the size of a Tylenol caplet and BARELY visible over the silver band holding it in place. I requested a refund but the seller keeps giving me the run around. Deceptive picture and poor customer service. Be warned.
Like

Since paper is a one year anniversary I decided to give this a try.  Absolutely amazing.  Love the design and how well made this is.  Only change I would suggest is that the book actually closes.  This way if you want to leave it open to show off that would be an option or close it so it does not take up all that space.  All that said if you are looking to give a gift that will def impress then this is the way to go.

The earrings looked just like the picture but they seemed so much more in person.  I gave them as a gift and my wife loves them.  The olny down side seems to be they are a little on the heavy side and she can't wear them more than 6 hours at a time.
For the price I was not expecting such quality. I thought it would be a novelty item.  I was pleasantly surprised to find it to be a regular use knife.

So cute! I wear this as a midi ring and I love it. Came sooner than expected too!

Update: I have since purchased two of these rings. I thought maybe the first one was faulty but both rings bent out of shape so easily and lost their color. The ring bent so much I couldn’t even get it to stay on my finger. I won’t purchase another one... very disappointed.

I like the weight and love the size. Perfect for an adult hand. The only thing I am not thrilled about is the end connections are not all perfect. This makes a ruff edge on the fingers. I might notice more because I love fiddling with it in one hand more than using two hands. Like I said I like the weight, but I think that is what makes the uneven edges bother the hand more so than lighter rings with constant use. I would still buy again.

I purchased this bracelet, in another color, over 4 years ago. I wore it every day and never took it off. The colors have barely faded, no loose strings, it has just gotten softer. I wanted a new color way so purchased this version. I fully expect it will hold up just as the other one had, which I will still wear occasionally

Don’t usually give a negative review of anything. This vinyl looks cheap. Thought it would be more, for lack of a better word, sophisticated looking.  Thi kI could have done better with a sharpie. Good luck to the seller.

I liked them & they served the purpose. Wish more came for the value but I did go ahead and get the printed envelopes. wish the name & monogram would’ve been raised & shiny... but there again would’ve cost more. Overall I’d buy again.
Very thin, and a major headache to put on the wall. Letters do not stick well while un-peeling. I would not buy again.
This was a gift but their ears were too sensitive and had they gave them away.
Beautiful scent! A spritz on the pillow calms my mind right before bed and helps me sleep. Will purchase again!
She loved them.
pinched ,painful

I'm sure many people will enjoy it. For my purposes, there's wasted space and the organization should be changed: Any necessary 'meal prep' and 'notes,' shown on the front side, should be permanently placed with your recipes for future reference instead of repetitively on the then current week's menu list. The backside blocks for grocery lists would be better associated if formatted like the front side menus in full horizontal boxes just like on the front side; and, divided in three columns - breakfast, lunch & dinner. I will use these as it's nice seeing graphics instead of the usual, formal Arial (etc) font.
Cute idea but I received my print with a large scratch across the middle, its awful

I scored some points with this one, Gents. Great quality with a special mineral that has extremely interesting characteristics uncommon to gemstones. If she has all the gemstones in the world then give her this ring with Bismuth mounted in it.
Very disappointed.  These are much smaller than depicted in the ad.

I really wanted to love this but it has a terrible smell of mold and “old Ed’s” as if it was stored in a damp environment. If I carry it in my pocket, I can smell it. My hand even smells after I handle it. Yuk!

This was a gift for my granddaughter.  I loved the options for ring bands and stones.  I will be gifting another similar ring to another granddaughter very soon.  The affordability for a lovely piece is a great way to introduce nice jewelry to some young ladies.
It is very pretty, made just the way we wanted it, bought two copper bracelets, one each for my daughters 12/2019. Now 08/2021 one of them just broke, not sure why.

I absolutely LOVE these earrings. So much so I purchased them in silver as well. They are so easy to slip on and go with everything! My only little draw back, is that there is no stopper and a few times I’ve reached up to find them almost out of my ear. I would recommend using a stopper on them so you don’t lose them.
Pretty beads. But the measurement was incorrect and the bracelet is too small…  Quality control issue.
I bought as a gift and added magnets to the back. The sister loves them
Looked like something a child made
I was thinking it was a bit smaller. Nice product. Just a bit costumey.
Sad that i had to read all the reviews to discover the size.
Great picture! It is a printed photo.
Not worth the price
Clip broke in less than a week after use. Cheap product.
Was not easy to install and looked different than image.
Solid product, but harder to slide up and down than old metal neckerchief slides.
I needed a stronger hook for hanging my 15" cast iron skillet. This hook is not going to bend under the weight of a big cast iron skillet. It works well and looks good.
Broke after two weeks not happy.

The coin purse, while having the use of various gum wrappers, was what I wanted as a gift to a close friend.  I returned it because it was hard in materials, so small ( even for a coin purse), and the zipper was almost impossible to open.  Maybe the larger sizes without a zipper closer would work, but this item would not “ fit the bill”.

Bought for a dress clip for the small of my back. I like the classic rose design and how it hides the clip attachment behind the rose. I returned it because it was too thick for comfort as I leaned back in my chair. Also, the protective plastic on the clips was a plus when I bought it, because I was looking to use it on a silk dress, but it's not strong enough to hold onto the slippery thin silk.

Your opinion of this product will be personal, just as what you like about certain kinds of art is personal. Personally, I didn't care for this scent at all. I purchased it because of its description "wood sage & sea salt". Unfortunately, I missed the tag word "impression". It smells like somebody threw this together based on their sense of smell and in my opinion, it misses the mark...badly. Instead I purchased a small, slender bottle of Fan di Fendi and then a second bottle because I like it very much.
The engraving is beautiful.
Great to identify my yeti cup at the gym

The photo is exactly what it looks like in person. The detail is amazing, you can tell the artist is very gifted, and the quality outstanding.
I have worn it twice and both times, people have asked where I purchased it and wanted to get one. I am very fortunate to be the first to review because I wanted to let others know about this wonderful experience.
What a cheap, over-priced piece of tiny junk!!!
very disappointed in these labels.  most of the sunflower was cut off the actual label
I like the design and concept of the product, kinda wish it was just slightly tiny bit thicker, just a little more though
The color didn't look anything like pic. They let me return it.  UPS shipping was $50.00
it Was exactly like the picture.
It is a nice leather key chain, the letters were kinda small
Very disappointed in this item. I believe it was way too expensive for the quality and size.
Personally I LOVE this handmade collar. The tie dye is very very nice. The buckle is great quality. My pup absolutely loves her new jewelry. Thanks ohmypawd. I’ll definitely order again.

Super cute but the top of my dog’s head is pretty flat.  All of my dogs have had that shape.  There was no way to make this work unless your dog is a breed with a round crown and/or a bunch of curly hair that sticks up.
Good quality, beautiful colors, exactly as described. I had it framed with people rave about it. Would definitely recommend.

This is the 1st one I purchased!!! It is the most attractive one I have seen. There is a beautiful and soothing energy with this one.  For all kinds of love in life....more love to be poured into your life!!!  Beyond worth it!!
Very nice prints.Very nice

I basically like these earrings but I hoped that they would be a bit more rounded as they appeared in the photo. The shapes were rather irregular. The posts are too long and if lying down in these one might get poked behind the ear. The earring fasteners are very small making them hard to handle and if dropped good luck finding them..
Love it! Wear all the time and color doesn’t fade

My daughter-in-law, to whom this was gifted, loves it very much. That's good enough for me. When she sent me the picture of it, though, I was disappointed that it didn't look at all like the one I saw online. I wanted the more orange one for a reason, and that's why I chose it. This one is more blue. I'm not even sure it is a fire opal. Even the setting is not the same as the ad pic. Also a disappointment to me. If I'd bought it for myself, I would send it back. That's why I give it only 3 stars.

Very large beautiful stones with a great setting. My only complaint is that the butterfly stays on the back were too small and I had to replace them so the earring would sit correctly in my ear. But these were a real bargain.
Too small. It smells and the bread gets the smelly ting.. I threw it away. Very dissatisfied.

it's very cute, just like the picture, however it flips downward facing down so flips my clothes outwards... can't wear it front of my clients it forces my clothes to show off more skin. I bought 2, one for me and one for a friend, it does the same thing for both of us.
If you put it on a lab coat however, it should be OK.

I love the look of this needle minder! It's super fun. However, the magnet isn't very strong, I think because the enamel is fairly thick. So while the needle stays fine when placed on the back, on the front it clings to the very edge and seems a bit tenuous to me. It does the job, just could be a bit stronger.
This smells lovely, but you can’t smell it further than 3 feet away. The only place it would work is in a closet, a tiny bathroom, or an apartment in New York.

I bought this because I thought it would smell like coconut - since the picture on the label is a coconut.
It does not smell like coconut at all.
It’s not bad and it’s a great blend that works for relaxation - just not what I was expecting scent-wise. Because of that, I’m a little disappointed. In all fairness to the maker, the product lists coconut carrier oil LAST with *multiple* oils listed before it in the ingredients section. Just make sure to read the ingredients I guess. The other oils in this seem to overpower any coconut that might be in it and I was excited thinking this would smell like coconut. No harm, no foul. Just not “coconutty.”
I loved the look of them. I could only wear once. The part that goes in the ear is so thin it pulled out into a straight line. They need to be a little heavier on the part that goes into the ear.
Printed on both sides…pattern is slightly off center, if that bothers you….doesn’t me.
It's cute.  I used it for a while but have decided it's not all that great.
Cute little hoops but once you take them out, they lose their shape and are worthless
These shirts run so small. I wear a large and this large was tight! My other shirts that are large give me room to move. Fabric is soft. Requested a return but no answer so far.
The whole picture. Looks beautiful on line but seeing the actual picture I didn’t like it
Smaller than expected. Could not use for intended purposes. Quality was o.k., just too tiny.

So  I  bought this to help  with  fertility  I will say the stones are heavy  so must be real. I noticed right away  Im in a more calmer  mood  , more happy I mean really happy like nothing can bother me. SO i been wear since  my cycle started I have a 6 days  more days to see if I  got pregnant  this month or  not. So I will update.
The pic is as big as a notebook paper. Heavy quality but the ink is not even and looks odd. Comes in small mailer. Just doesn’t do what a15 x 24 size might or a poster could give you.
Within 20 minutes chain did not break but came apart at the hasp.  Contacted seller 3 days ago no response.  This was for my granddaughter and I am very disappointed.

The pics are exactly as they said in the description, but "unframed" should be much further up the description instead of at the end. I didn't read to the very end of the description and missed the "unframed" bit. My assumption was it had a wooden backing or the like. Wo is me
Very nice quality, but wish it came with a necklace.
If you like dainty, then you will love these
This was way too tiny for me. Picture made it look bigger.
Good quality earrings but the moonstone has very very little blue flash, certainly can't be seen while wearing it.
A very nice find. Great price
works well clear clean
Makes a nice gift, especially if you take the made in china sticker off of the back of the clock, which is actually a watch.
This product description made it appear handmade, it looks exactly like the pic and came from China. Took forever to arrive. I think the recipient (it is a gift) will really like it.

Thought this was going to be the best gift ever for a brother whose family even decorates with Disney. Was thrilled the company offered a proof supposedly before the item was sent and that I could add a card with a few words. Both the proof and the card which I paid extra for came blank. I had to call my brother to find out if he even got the item and he said he had no idea who it came from because the card was blank. If you're going to offer service and you're going to charge for it you better deliver. This is a decent soap. It smells quite nice and has good lather. The main reason that I'm rating it one star is that there is false advertising with this item- it is made from a melt and pour soap base, NOT cold process.

I was initially suspicious when I saw that the bar is transparent rather than opaque. Additionally, the loofah was entirely encased in soap, as if it was sliced into discs and put into a mold that the soap was then individually poured onto. There shouldn't have been soap that thick on either side if the soap was cured with the loofah in the center of the mold and then sliced.

I then checked out the ingredients and, instead of listing the oils used followed by lye, it says "glycerin soap base".

When soap is made by cold process, the oils are mixed together and saponification happens when lye is mixed into the oils. It then needs to cure in a mold for a number of months to create a solid bar that lasts for a long time.

This is also how soap base is made, but glycerin in added in as well. This base is then sold to the soap maker, who uses it to create melt and pour soap. This soap is easier to make and can be prettier, but isn't as hard and doesn't last as long as true cold process.

There isn't anything wrong with selling melt and pour soap, but it is misleading to label this as cold processed and market it as "made the old fashioned way". Additionally, while almost $8 would be a fair price for a bar of true cold processed soap, this is far too high for melt and pour.

Do not support this seller by purchasing this soap until they are upfront about the product that they're selling and lower the price to reflect its quality.
